seo.meta_description: Watch how Content Cucumber turns your conference booth into months of marketing content. Professional video production, guided interviews, polished deliverables.
seo.og_description: Isaac walks you through Content Cucumber's Live Event Content service. See how we turn 3 days at your booth into 3 months of marketing.

form.subtitle: Tell us which event you're attending.
form.trust_text: Hundreds of interviews recorded. 30+ years in ecommerce. Zero fluff.

thankyou.title: You're booked! Here's what happens next.
thankyou.text: We'll be in touch shortly with logistics and a short prep guide so your team is ready to look great on camera.

data.title:

months of marketing.
paragraphs: Isaac walks you through exactly what Live Event Content looks like, what you get, and why brands leave with a content library instead of just badge scans.
data.youtube_title: Live Event Content by Content Cucumber
data.youtube_caption: Isaac introduces Live Event Content by Content Cucumber.

data.title: What You Get
data.subtitle: Every Live Event Content package includes polished, ready-to-use assets.

items.name: Short-Form Video Clips
items.target: Professionally edited interview clips ready for social, web, presentations, and sales outreach.
outcomes: Horizontal cuts for web and presentations
Raw footage and audio files included

items.name: Post-Event Email Campaign
items.target: A structured follow-up sequence built from your conference footage.
outcomes: Follow-up sequence using your video clips
Personalized for prospects met at the event
Keeps momentum alive after the show
Drives traffic to your landing pages

items.name: Content Distribution
items.target: We handle getting your video content out to the world.
outcomes: SEO and AEO blog articles from interviews
Repurposed for multiple channels and formats

data.title: Ready to turn your next conference into a content engine?
data.text: Tell us which event you're attending. We'll put together a plan that turns your booth presence into months of marketing assets.
